comments.body: do you mean that the new-line character (`\n`) is missing?

@gouyang this is actually working for me.
```
➜  buildah git:(inspect) sudo buildah inspect 3fbea -t container --format "{{.Container}}"                 
myalpine-working-container
```
Can you try again or tell me how exactly to reproduce?

It could be reproducible every time, to reproduce it just run the command shows in the description.
What's buildah version are you running?

```
# ./buildah version

Go Version:    go1.9.2

OS/Arch:       linux/amd64

8e91bb69c95b     *     5b0d59026729 docker.io/library/busybox:latest busybox
c78d5ef67180     *     5b0d59026729 docker.io/library/busybox:latest busybox-2

[root@bootp-73-3-165 buildah]# buildah inspect -t container  -f "{{ .Container }}" ad67dc464aac
```
